suno.description: Music generation + stem extraction via Suno (API-first; browser optional).

rvc.description: Cloud RVC voice conversion + training via Replicate (no local GPU).

stem.description: Cloud stem separation via LALAL.AI / Replicate Demucs (no local GPU).

audio.description: CPU DSP: analyze, align, vocal_chain, mix; mastering via LANDR API; cloud ASR.
